data.title: Fujifilm Named 2026 TIME100 Influential Company & Industry Leader
data.description: Fujifilm Holdings Corporation, based in Tokyo, has been recognized as one of TIME's TIME100 Most Influential Companies of 2026 and an Industry Leader in Hardware. TIME100 acknowledges companies annually for their significant global impact. Fujifilm was labeled a "Pioneer" for its dedication to creating cutting-edge products and technologies to enhance human interaction. This recognition highlights Fujifilm's prominent position in various sectors such as imaging, healthcare, business innovation, and electronics.

data.title: CPKC executives to address the Bank of America Industrials, Transportation and Airlines Key Leaders Conference on May 13
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on April 30, 2026, two executives from Canadian Pacific Kansas City, Nadeem Velani and Mark Redd, will be speaking at the 2026 Bank of America Industrials event. Canadian Pacific is represented on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: CP) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: CP) under the ticker symbol CPKC. Nadeem Velani serves as the Executive Vice-President and Chief Financial Officer, while Mark Redd is the Executive Vice-President and Chief Operating Officer for the company.

data.title: Club Offers for Travel Enthusiasts in the UK
data.description: London, April 30, 2026 - Travelzoo® (NASDAQ: TZOO) has revealed new Club Offers for its members in the UK. Among the several deals available, three highlights include a package priced at £518 for a two-night stay at one of Devon's top hotels, which also includes dinner. These exclusive offers cater to travel enthusiasts seeking vetted and negotiated deals.

data.title: APRANGA APB annual report 2025
data.description: The 2025 consolidated and annual financial statements, which include audited annual financial statements, management report, auditor's report, limited assurance report, and approval by responsible individuals, were approved by the ordinary general meeting of shareholders of APB "Apranga" on April 30, 2026.

data.title: Provident Bank Celebrates 70 Years of Community Impact with Over $984,000 Donated to Local Nonprofits Since 2006 Through Its Community Partnership Program
data.description: For 70 years, Provident Bank has been making a significant impact on the community by donating over $984,000 to local nonprofits since 2006 through its Community Partnership Program. This long-standing commitment to giving back has helped support various organizations and initiatives in the community, highlighting Provident Bank as a key contributor to the wellbeing of the region.

data.title: CPSC Posts Product Recalls to its Web Site
data.description: Today, the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) revealed the recall of 8.2 million Stainless King Food Jars and Bottles by Thermos due to the risk of serious impact injury. This recall was done in collaboration with the involved companies and further details can be found on the CPSC website.

data.title: Atlantic Cigar Company Announces New Premium Cigar Releases Following PCA Trade Show
data.description: Norristown, Pennsylvania - On April 30, 2026, Atlantic Cigar Company announced the launch of new premium cigar offerings on its online store after participating in the PCA Trade Show in New Orleans. This event revealed numerous highly anticipated products within the cigar industry. Customers can now explore the latest additions on the company's platform.

data.title: Ambulatory RCM AI Market Is Optimizing the Wrong Layer and Missing More Than $170 Billion in Annual Value
data.description: White Plume, the company responsible for STAR² Ai, has revealed that the majority of AI and automation solutions are focused on the incorrect financial sector, capturing less than 15% of potential ambulatory economic opportunities. This leads to the substantial EBITDA potential being obscured before claims are generated.
